zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Pigot於大約1440年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾華阿登時，他的父親Sir Richard Pigot40歲，母親Lady Alicia Fennel40歲。他與Margaret Giffard在英國巴金哈姆爾蕾托 霍武德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1493年在他的家鄉享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Pigot于大约1440年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾華阿登时，他的父亲Sir Richard Pigot40岁，母亲Lady Alicia Fennel40岁。他与Margaret Giffard在英国巴金哈姆爾蕾托 霍武德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1493年在他的家乡享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pigot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Pickett
meanings: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Picot, Pigot, a pet form of Pic (see Pike 6). In Middle English, the form Piket (Old French Picquet) was also common.
sometimes a late development of   Pickard   1 or 2.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Pigot was born about 1440, in Whaddon, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Sir Richard Pigot, was 40 and his mother, Lady Alicia Fennel, was 40. He married Margaret Giffard in Little Horwood, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1493, in his hometown, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Pigot est né environ 1440, à Whaddon, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Pigot, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Lady Alicia Fennel, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Giffard à Little Horwood, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1493, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Pigot um 1440 in Whaddon, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Pigot 40 und seine Mutter Lady Alicia Fennel 40. Er hat in Little Horwood, Buckinghamshire, England Margaret Giffard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1493 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Pigot è nato il circa 1440 nel Whaddon, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Pigot, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alicia Fennel, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Giffard nel Little Horwood, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1493, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Pigotが約1440年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウアッドオンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Pigotは40歳，母Lady Alicia Fennelは40歳であった。イギリスブクインガムシュアイアリットル ホールウッドでMargaret Giffardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1493年に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Pigot(이)가 대략 1440년 영국 벅잉함실르 화아던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Pigot(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alicia Fennel(은)는 40세였다. 그는 영국 벅잉함실르 리틀 호우드에서 Margaret Giffard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1493년 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Pigot nasceu aproximadamente 1440, em Whaddon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Pigot, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alicia Fennel, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Giffard em Little Horwood, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1493, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Pigot родился около 1440 г. в местности уаддон, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Pigot было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alicia Fennel, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Giffard в местности литл хаурвуд, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1493 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Pigot nació aproximadamente 1440, en Whaddon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Pigot, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Lady Alicia Fennel, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Margaret Giffard en Little Horwood, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1493, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años.
